steps.title: Locate the key contrast in the notes
steps.content: The notes explicitly describe two opposing qualities in each print's subject matter: Doi's depicts a tranquil, everyday scene, while Tana's features an explicitly political point of view. This content contrast is what needs to be expressed in the answer.

steps.title: Match the contrast to the correct choice
steps.content: Choice C directly expresses the subject-matter contrast: one work expresses an explicitly political point of view while the other depicts a tranquil, everyday scene. The other choices miss the goal — A and B address printing technique, which isn't about subject matter, and D contrasts dates. That matches choice C — C is correct.
